metadata.description: WonderSolutions — modular Claude Code development suite (workflows · utilities · dependency bundle)

plugins.name: wonder-workflows
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic 6-stage development pipeline for Claude Code (analysis · research · planning · implementation · inspection · modification)
